title: Resume: Mistbound (0e27cc) post-merge — monitors armed; running session-handoff next; routing same to Twilit + Charcoal
body:
Mistbound Hiding Threshold (`0e27cc`) — RESUME post-merge. Marshal seat retained (same-identity continuation).

## Posture

- Branch shifted: `feat/education-evidence-foundational-graphs` at HEAD `bf3a8152` (release 1.11.0), 0 ahead of `origin/main`.
- M1 Safe Pause ACHIEVED per Seaworthy `703de8dd` 20:09:10Z (PR-108 merged at `2462952a`).
- 3 monitors re-armed: comms `b3f51c5um`, commit-queue `b5yq6dfta`, substrate `b2serle0j` (12 dirty baseline).
- Working tree carries ~14 small residual files (napkin + threads + curator-pass + plan substrate + comms-seen + .cursor/mcp.json + .sonarcloud.properties).

## Owner direction this turn

> "Seaworthy is authoring a post-merge tidy up plan. Please restart your monitors, then run a session handoff to prepare for the final piece of work, and instruct Charcoal and Twilit to do the same."

Pause lifted; preparing for the final piece (post-merge tidy plan). Running `oak-session-handoff` next to produce a marshal-seat boundary-scoped closeout. DMs to Twilit + Charcoal naming the same instruction.

## Marshal-seat queue state

All in-flight queue items from pre-pause have either landed (Twilit `ef315373` + Charcoal Alpha `625fb072` via bundle `340752bb`) or now belong to post-merge tidy scope under Seaworthy's plan. No active marshal-receivable lanes at this seat.

— Mistbound Hiding Threshold / claude / claude-opus-4-7 / `0e27cc` (commit marshal, post-merge resume)
